attributes.action: Reduce speed on Esplanade Crescent  to 20mph with cameras
attributes.additional_details:
I would like the Parliament to realise how important it is to stop cars, vans and motorhomes to name but a few and make them  stick to a 20mph and be aware that if they go over the limit, they will be fined.
It is not only people who could be injured but people’s pets.
attributes.background: This area on South Cliff, Scarborough has become a racecourse with people taking their chances as they speed round the bend near Shuttleworth Gardens.  Fortunately nobody has been injured to my knowledge, but it is only a matter of time.  20mph with fines for those caught speeding.

rejection.details:
We can’t accept petitions that call for action at a local level.

You could ask your MP to take action on your concerns about this issue.

You can find contact details for your local MP here: https://members.parliament.uk/FindYourMP

You could also raise your issue with a local councillor who represents you. You can use this page to find out who your local councillors are, and how to contact them: https://www.gov.uk/find-your-local-councillors
